creator: andy@icc.surw.chel.su
text:
This is a port of xap and xwf 0.7.8, Application Panel and File
Manager for X Window System.

WWW: http://www.hdk-berlin.de/~rasca/xap/


# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	xap-xwf-0.7.8
#	xap-xwf-0.7.8/Makefile
#	xap-xwf-0.7.8/files
#	xap-xwf-0.7.8/files/md5
#	xap-xwf-0.7.8/patches
#	xap-xwf-0.7.8/patches/patch-aa
#	xap-xwf-0.7.8/patches/patch-ab
#	xap-xwf-0.7.8/patches/patch-ac
#	xap-xwf-0.7.8/pkg
#	xap-xwf-0.7.8/pkg/PLIST
#	xap-xwf-0.7.8/pkg/COMMENT
#	xap-xwf-0.7.8/pkg/DESCR
#
echo c - xap-xwf-0.7.8
mkdir -p xap-xwf-0.7.8 > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - xap-xwf-0.7.8/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >xap-xwf-0.7.8/Makefile << 'END-of-xap-xwf-0.7.8/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	xap-xwf
X# Version required:			0.7.8
X# Date created:				18 August 1999
X# Whom:					Andrey Zakhvatov
X#
X# $Id$
X#
X
XDISTNAME=	xap-0.7.8
XPKGNAME=	xap-xwf-0.7.8
XCATEGORIES=	misc
XMASTER_SITES=	http://www.hdk-berlin.de/~rasca/
X
XMAINTAINER=	andy@icc.surw.chel.su
X
XLIB_DEPENDS=	gdk12:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/gtk12 \
X		glib12:${PORTSDIR}/devel/glib12 \
X		gmodule12:${PORTSDIR}/devel/glib12 \
X		gtk12:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/gtk12 \
X		intl:${PORTSDIR}/devel/gettext
X
XWRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/xap
X
XALL_TARGET=
XUSE_X_PREFIX=	yes
XUSE_AUTOCONF=	yes
XCONFIGURE_ARGS=	--with-terminal=${X11BASE}/bin/xterm
XCONFIGURE_ENV=	CFLAGS="${CFLAGS} -I${LOCALBASE}/include" \
X		GTK_CONFIG="${X11BASE}/bin/gtk12-config"
X
XMAN1=		xap.1 xwf.1
X
Xpost-install:
X	@ ${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/share/examples/xap-xwf
X.for file in Mlvwmrc-Xwf mkFvwmXapMenu xap.rc xwf.rc
X	@ ${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/${file} ${PREFIX}/share/examples/xap-xwf
X.endfor
X.if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
X	@ ${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/share/doc/xap-xwf
X.for file in COPYING ChangeLog README TODO index.html
X	@ ${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/${file} ${PREFIX}/share/doc/xap-xwf
X.endfor
X.endif
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-xap-xwf-0.7.8/Makefile
echo c - xap-xwf-0.7.8/files
mkdir -p xap-xwf-0.7.8/files > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - xap-xwf-0.7.8/files/md5
sed 's/^X//' >xap-xwf-0.7.8/files/md5 << 'END-of-xap-xwf-0.7.8/files/md5'
XMD5 (xap-0.7.8.tar.gz) = cd27374aebc313d10deed8871ae6467d
END-of-xap-xwf-0.7.8/files/md5
echo c - xap-xwf-0.7.8/patches
mkdir -p xap-xwf-0.7.8/patches > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - xap-xwf-0.7.8/patches/patch-aa
sed 's/^X//' >xap-xwf-0.7.8/patches/patch-aa << 'END-of-xap-xwf-0.7.8/patches/patch-aa'
X--- configure.in	Tue May  4 01:22:40 1999
X+++ /home/andy/tmp/wrk/configure.in	Wed Aug 18 16:32:09 1999
X@@ -34,19 +34,19 @@
X AC_PATH_X
X AC_PATH_XTRA
X 
X-gtk_prefix=`gtk-config --prefix`
X+gtk_prefix=`$GTK_CONFIG --prefix`
X if test x$gtk_prefix != x; then
X 	LIBS="$LIBS -L$gtk_prefix/lib"
X-	X_CFLAGS="$X_CFLAGS -I$gtk_prefix/include"
X+	X_CFLAGS="$X_CFLAGS -I$gtk_prefix/include/gtk12"
X fi
X-glib_prefix=`glib-config --prefix`
X+glib_prefix=`glib12-config --prefix`
X if test x$glib_prefix != x; then
X 	LIBS="$LIBS -L$glib_prefix/lib"
X-	X_CFLAGS="$X_CFLAGS -I$glib_prefix/lib/glib/include"
X+	X_CFLAGS="$X_CFLAGS -I$glib_prefix/include/glib12"
X fi
X LIBS="$LIBS $X_LIBS"
X-AC_CHECK_LIB(gdk, gdk_event_put)
X-AC_CHECK_LIB(gtk, gtk_ctree_new)
X+AC_CHECK_LIB(gdk12, gdk_event_put)
X+AC_CHECK_LIB(gtk12, gtk_ctree_new)
X AC_CHECK_LIB(intl, textdomain)
X 
X AC_CHECK_FUNC(getopt, [getopt=yes])
END-of-xap-xwf-0.7.8/patches/patch-aa
echo x - xap-xwf-0.7.8/patches/patch-ab
sed 's/^X//' >xap-xwf-0.7.8/patches/patch-ab << 'END-of-xap-xwf-0.7.8/patches/patch-ab'
X--- xap.c	Wed Jun 16 15:53:00 1999
X+++ /home/andy/tmp/wrk/xap.c	Wed Aug 18 16:41:11 1999
X@@ -29,7 +29,7 @@
X #include <limits.h>
X #include <X11/Xlib.h>
X #include "i18n.h"
X-#ifdef HAVE_LIBGTK
X+#ifdef HAVE_LIBGTK12
X #include "xap_gui.h"
X #else
X #error HAVE_LIBGTK not defined
END-of-xap-xwf-0.7.8/patches/patch-ab
echo x - xap-xwf-0.7.8/patches/patch-ac
sed 's/^X//' >xap-xwf-0.7.8/patches/patch-ac << 'END-of-xap-xwf-0.7.8/patches/patch-ac'
X--- xwf.c	Mon May 24 14:41:51 1999
X+++ /home/andy/tmp/wrk/xwf.c	Wed Aug 18 16:43:50 1999
X@@ -29,7 +29,7 @@
X #endif
X #include <limits.h>
X #include <X11/Xlib.h>	/* XParseGeometry */
X-#ifdef HAVE_LIBGTK
X+#ifdef HAVE_LIBGTK12
X #include <glib.h>
X #include "xwf_gui.h"
X #include "xwf_cfg.h"
END-of-xap-xwf-0.7.8/patches/patch-ac
echo c - xap-xwf-0.7.8/pkg
mkdir -p xap-xwf-0.7.8/pkg > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - xap-xwf-0.7.8/pkg/PLIST
sed 's/^X//' >xap-xwf-0.7.8/pkg/PLIST << 'END-of-xap-xwf-0.7.8/pkg/PLIST'

sed 's/^X//' >xap-xwf-0.7.8/pkg/COMMENT << 'END-of-xap-xwf-0.7.8/pkg/COMMENT'

END-of-xap-xwf-0.7.8/pkg/COMMENT

sed 's/^X//' >xap-xwf-0.7.8/pkg/DESCR << 'END-of-xap-xwf-0.7.8/pkg/DESCR'

Fix: 

Please, check and commit this port.
